title: cerastium alpinum subsp. squalidum
intro: Cerastium alpinum subsp. squalidum, also known as Alpine Chickweed or Mountain Chickweed, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cerastium alpinum subsp. squalidum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and treat wounds. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to be consumed or applied topically as a treatment for various health issues.
